title: Core Concepts in Health
body:
Health depends on prevention, diagnosis, treatment, recovery, and rehabilitation. The best systems pay attention to all five, not only acute care.

Determinants of health include housing, nutrition, education, work, stress, air quality, and social support. Medicine sits inside those forces rather than above them.

Evidence-based medicine asks what actually works, for whom, and at what cost. That makes clinical trial design, risk, and data quality central to the topic.

Mental health, physical health, and public health are all part of the same system.
furtherReading: The Emperor of All Maladies by Siddhartha Mukherjee
